name: Bobotie
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs lean ground beef or mutton, room temperature
1 slice white bread 1 1/2 inch thick, crusts removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Pre-heat oven to 350°F (180°C).
2. Spray a large casserole dish with non-stick spray.
3. Soak bread in half cup of the milk, press dry and mix with lean ground meat.
4. Mix the rest of the ingredients except leftover milk, cooking oil, eggs, and bay leaves into the meat mixture.
5. Heat oil in a large saucepan and sauté meat mixture until just browned.
6. Transfer meat mixture to prepared casserole dish, spreading it evenly.
7. Beat eggs into the leftover milk and pour over the meat mixture. Garnish with bay leaves.
8. Bake at 350°F (180°C) until the egg custard has set.
9. Serve with yellow rice and raisins.
